title: Works for a Living
summary: You take great satisfaction in a job well done, whether it’s coding, building houses, or mining asteroids.
tiers: Tier 3: Eye for Detail or Improvise
Tier 6: Greater Enhanced Potential or Hard-Won Resilience
gm_intrusions: Repairs sometimes fail. Wiring can be tricky to decipher and still carry an electrical charge. Some people are rude to those who work for a living.
text: You take great satisfaction in a job well done, whether it’s coding, building houses, or mining asteroids.
